After Hours Mobile Notary in Charlotte, NC

Need a notary outside normal business hours in Charlotte, NC? Integrity Closings CLT offers after-hours mobile notary services, including evenings and weekends. We come to your home, office, hospital, or agreed meeting location when you need a notary the most.

Call or text 980-505-8050 to schedule your appointment.

Evening and Weekend Notary Services

We understand that not everyone is available during standard business hours. Our after-hours mobile notary service in Charlotte, NC provides flexible scheduling for clients who need notarizations in the evening or on weekends.

Convenient Mobile Appointments

We travel to homes, offices, hospitals, nursing homes, and other locations throughout Charlotte and surrounding areas. Our goal is to make notarization convenient, even outside of normal hours.

Documents We Can Notarize

Power of Attorney
Loan Documents
Real Estate Documents
Affidavits
Estate Planning Documents
Medical Forms
General Notary Documents

After-hours and weekend availability

Frequently Asked Questions

What are your after-hours notary availability times?

We typically offer regular business hours from 8 AM to 6 PM, but our after-hours services are available late evenings and on weekends by appointment to accommodate emergency situations and working professionals.

Do you charge extra for evening or weekend appointments?

Yes, standard notarial fees are regulated by the state at $10 per signature, but mobile travel and convenience fees will vary based on the time of day, distance, and urgency of the request.

What if I need an emergency notary in the middle of the night?

For extreme emergencies like hospital bedside document notarizations, please call or text us right away. We do our absolute best to accommodate urgent medical needs 24/7.

Where can an after-hours notary meet me?

For your safety and ours during late hours, we prefer meeting at well-lit public locations like 24-hour diners, hotel lobbies, hospital cafeterias, or safe-exchange zones at police stations.

How quickly can you arrive for an out-of-hours request?

Response times depend entirely on traffic and our current location in the Charlotte metro area. Typically, we can dispatch a mobile notary to your location within 60 to 90 minutes.

Areas We Serve

We provide after-hours mobile notary services in Charlotte, Matthews, Mint Hill, Concord, Pineville, Monroe, and nearby areas.

Need an after-hours mobile notary in Charlotte, NC?

Call or text 980-505-8050 to book your appointment today.

Professional mobile notary and loan signing services brought directly to your doorstep.
